_instructions.critical: Only modify 'passes' field. Never change structure.
_instructions.workflow: One task at a time. Full verification. Commit after each.

tasks.description: Move top-level imports from inline locations (32 PLC0415 errors)
steps: Identify all PLC0415 (import not at top-level) errors
Move imports to top of each file
Verify no circular import issues
Run: cd backend && .venv/bin/ruff check app/ --select PLC0415
Verify: Zero PLC0415 errors

tasks.description: Fix global statement usage (10 PLW0603 errors)
steps: Review each global statement usage
Refactor to use class-based singletons or module-level caching patterns
Run: cd backend && .venv/bin/ruff check app/ --select PLW0603
Verify: Zero PLW0603 errors

tasks.description: Fix remaining lint issues (SIM, B904, PLR, RUF)
steps: Fix B904: Add 'from err' or 'from None' to raise statements (2 errors)
Fix SIM102: Combine nested if statements (2 errors)
Fix SIM117: Combine nested with statements (2 errors)
Fix PLR0911: Reduce return statements or add ignore (2 errors)
Fix RUF012: Add ClassVar annotation (1 error)
Run: cd backend && .venv/bin/ruff check app/
Verify: Zero ruff errors total
Fix _cursor attribute access on DatabaseConnection
Fix Dict entry type mismatches
Run: cd backend && .venv/bin/mypy app/scripts/validate_data_integrity.py
Verify: Zero errors in this file
Fix query() argument type - needs list instead of dict
Update all 4 query() calls with correct parameter type
Run: cd backend && .venv/bin/mypy app/services/market_events_service.py
Verify: Zero errors in this file

tasks.description: Fix remaining type errors across codebase
steps: Fix each remaining mypy error
Add type: ignore comments where fixing is impractical
Run: cd backend && .venv/bin/mypy app/ --no-error-summary | grep -c 'error:' || echo 0
Verify: Less than 10 errors remaining
Run: cd frontend && npm run lint 2>&1 | grep no-unused-vars
Remove or prefix unused variables with underscore
Run: cd frontend && npm run lint 2>&1 | grep -c no-unused-vars || echo 0
Verify: Zero unused variable errors
Run: cd frontend && npm run lint 2>&1 | grep no-unescaped-entities
Replace apostrophes with ' or template literals
Verify: Zero unescaped entity errors

tasks.description: Fix explicit-any and other TypeScript errors
steps: Run: cd frontend && npm run lint 2>&1 | grep -E '@typescript-eslint'
Add proper types or // eslint-disable comments where needed
Verify: Minimal TypeScript lint errors

tasks.description: Address design token violations (batch fix high-impact files)
steps: Identify top 5 files with most design token violations
Replace hardcoded colors with design tokens for those files
Document remaining violations for future work (tech debt)
Verify: Build still passes after changes

phases.name: Dead Code Removal
phases.goal: Remove unused imports and obvious dead code

tasks.description: Run ruff autofix for unused imports
steps: Run: cd backend && .venv/bin/ruff check app/ --select F401 --fix
Run: cd backend && .venv/bin/ruff check app/ --select F841 --fix
Run: cd backend && .venv/bin/pytest tests/ -x --tb=short -q
Verify: Tests still pass
Run: cd backend && .venv/bin/pytest tests/ -x --tb=short -q
Run: cd backend && .venv/bin/ruff check app/
Run: cd backend && .venv/bin/mypy app/ --no-error-summary | grep -c 'error:' || echo 0
Run: cd frontend && npm run build
Run: cd frontend && npm run lint 2>&1 | tail -5
Generate improvement report comparing to baseline
